en: Well, because she's his aunt, and she has amnesia, so she can't remember that she's his aunt.
ko: 음, 그녀가 그의 이모이기 때문인데, 기억상실증이 있어서

en: You see what I say? It's like a very forbidden kind of...
I don't understand why you left, but didn't leave.
ko: 왜 떠났으면서 떠나지 않았는지 이해가 안 돼.

en: Oh, well, because, you know, the mountains around the Encanto are pretty tall, and, uh,
and like, you know, like I said, free food and everything.
Yeah, you guys, you guys love the free food, don't you?
ko: 그래, 너희들, 공짜 음식 정말 좋아하지?

en: Yeah, my, my gift wasn't helping the family, but, uh, but I love my family, you know?
I just don't know how to, I just don't know how to...
Well, anyway, I, I think you should go, because, um, I don't really have a good reason, but
ko: 어쨌든, 나는 네가 가야 한다고 생각해,
